use_cases: User authentication flows for web applications and SaaS platforms
Login forms with interactive hover effects for enhanced UX
Secure credential entry with password visibility toggle functionality
Dark mode compatible sign-in forms for modern applications
Branded authentication screens with animated input interactions
ai_summary: A modern animated sign-in form component featuring interactive input fields with radial gradient hover effects that follow the mouse cursor. Built with motion/react for smooth animations and lucide-react icons for password visibility toggle. Supports dark mode with Tailwind CSS styling, creating an engaging authentication experience with a minimalist visual style and blue accent colors.
